title: Toward Robust Machine Learning Models for MALDI-TOF MS: Novel Approaches for Mycobacterium abscessus Subspecies Identification
description_es: Este trabajo presenta enfoques innovadores de aprendizaje automático para mejorar la identificación de subespecies de Mycobacterium abscessus usando espectrometría de masas MALDI-TOF.
abstract: Matrix-Assisted Laser Desorption/Ionization Time-of-Flight Mass Spectrometry (MALDI-TOF MS) has revolutionized microbial identification. However, subspecies-level discrimination remains challenging. This study presents novel machine learning approaches for robust identification of Mycobacterium abscessus subspecies, addressing key challenges in data preprocessing, feature selection, and model generalization.

citations.apa: Padial-Fuillerat, E., Martínez-Manjón, J. E., Zwir, I., Arroyo, M. J., Blázquez-Sánchez, M., Rodríguez-Temporal, D., Rodríguez, B., Mancera, L., & del Val, C. (2026). Toward Robust Machine Learning Models for MALDI-TOF MS: Novel Approaches for Mycobacterium abscessus Subspecies Identification. Journal of Proteome Research, 25(3), 1305-1318.
citations.mla: Padial-Fuillerat, Erica, et al. "Toward Robust Machine Learning Models for MALDI-TOF MS: Novel Approaches for Mycobacterium abscessus Subspecies Identification." Journal of Proteome Research, vol. 25, no. 3, 2026, pp. 1305-1318.

contributions: Novel ML approaches for MALDI-TOF MS analysis
